ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code post */,
  "class_type" INTEGER /* Type of class associated with the code (e.g., function, module) */,
  "lines_from_to" TEXT /* Range of lines in the code (e.g., 1 - 14) */,
  "no_of_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines in the code segment */,
  "similarity" INTEGER /* Similarity score indicating how similar the code is to others */,
  "code_char" INTEGER /* Character count of the code segment */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file the code segment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file the code segment belongs to */,
  "programming_language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the code segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code segment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code segment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_class_type FOREIGN KEY ("class_type") REFERENCES class_types ("class_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_types" (
  "class_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class type */,
  "class_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the class type (e.g., function, module) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similarity_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity score entry */,
  "post_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first code post being compared */,
  "post_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second code post being compared */,
  "similarity_score" INTEGER /* Calculated similarity score between the two code posts */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., line-by-line, semantic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the similarity score was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_scores_post_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("post_id1") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_scores_post_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("post_id2") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_posts" (
  "project_post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project post relation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code post associated with the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project post relation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_posts_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_posts_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the post */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_projects" (
  "repository_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository project relation */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repository project relation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_projects_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_projects" (
  "integration_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration project relation */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration project relation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_projects_integration_id FOREIGN KEY ("integration_id") REFERENCES integrations ("integration_id")
)
